spanish: Genera 20 u/s durante el día. Mejorable.

german: Combines two electrical inputs into a single output
russian: Combines two electrical inputs into a single output

english: A kit to deploy a security camera.
spanish: Kit para instalar una camara de seguridad.
german: A kit to deploy a security camera.
russian: A kit to deploy a security camera.

english: A kit to deploy a security monitor.
spanish: Kit para instalar un monitor de seguridad.
german: A kit to deploy a security monitor.
russian: A kit to deploy a security monitor.

spanish: Muestra imagen de camara. Consume 10 u/s.

original: Kit to deploy a water pump.
english: Kit to deploy a water pump.
spanish: Kit para instalar una bomba de agua.
german: Kit to deploy a water pump.
russian: Kit to deploy a water pump.

spanish: Bomba de agua eléctrica. 50 u/s. Mejorable.

original: Electric water pump with 50L tank. 50 u/s.
english: Electric water pump with 50L tank. 50 u/s.
spanish: Bomba de agua eléctrica con depósito de 50L. 50 u/s.
german: Electric water pump with 50L tank. 50 u/s.
russian: Electric water pump with 50L tank. 50 u/s.

original: Kit to deploy an incinerator furnace.
english: Kit to deploy an incinerator furnace.
spanish: Kit para instalar un horno incinerador.

original: Burns items to generate 50 u/s of power.
english: Burns items to generate 50 u/s of power.
spanish: Quema objetos para generar 50 u/s de energía.
german: Verbrennt Gegenstände um 50 u/s Strom zu erzeugen.
russian: Сжигает предметы для генерации 50 ед/с энергии.

original: An automated item sorter. Place near a container to link.
english: An automated item sorter. Place near a container to link.
spanish: Un clasificador automatico de items. Colocar cerca de un contenedor.
german: Ein automatischer Gegenstandssortierer. In der Naehe eines Behaelters platzieren.
russian: Автоматический сортировщик предметов. Размещайте рядом с контейнером.

original: Sorts items from its linked container to downstream containers based on filter rules. Requires power.
english: Sorts items from its linked container to downstream containers based on filter rules. Requires power.
spanish: Clasifica items del contenedor vinculado a contenedores conectados segun reglas de filtro. Requiere electricidad.
german: Sortiert Gegenstaende aus dem verknuepften Behaelter in nachgeschaltete Behaelter basierend auf Filterregeln. Benoetigt Strom.
russian: Сортирует предметы из связанного контейнера в подключённые контейнеры по правилам фильтрации. Требуется питание.

original: A powerful directional searchlight. Place to deploy.
english: A powerful directional searchlight. Place to deploy.
spanish: Un potente reflector direccional. Colocar para desplegar.
german: Ein leistungsstarker Suchscheinwerfer. Platzieren zum Aufstellen.
russian: Мощный направленный прожектор. Установите для развертывания.

original: A tripod-mounted searchlight. Requires 25 u/s of power.
english: A tripod-mounted searchlight. Requires 25 u/s of power.
spanish: Reflector montado en tripode. Requiere 25 u/s de energia.
german: Ein auf einem Stativ montierter Suchscheinwerfer. Benoetigt 25 u/s Strom.
russian: Прожектор на треноге. Требуется 25 ед/с энергии.

original: A motion sensor module. Place to deploy.
english: A motion sensor module. Place to deploy.
spanish: Modulo sensor de movimiento. Coloca para desplegar.
russian: Модуль датчика движения. Установите для развертывания.

original: Detects nearby players and allows power through. Requires 5 u/s.
english: Detects nearby players and allows power through. Requires 5 u/s.
spanish: Detecta jugadores cercanos y permite el paso de corriente. Requiere 5 u/s.
german: Erkennt Spieler in der Naehe und laesst Strom durch. Benoetigt 5 u/s.
russian: Обнаруживает ближайших игроков и пропускает ток. Требуется 5 ед/с.

original: A latching lever switch. Place to deploy.
english: A latching lever switch. Place to deploy.
spanish: Un interruptor de palanca. Coloca para desplegar.

original: A latching toggle switch with LED status indicator.
english: A latching toggle switch with LED status indicator.
spanish: Un interruptor de palanca con indicador LED.

original: A logic gate. Output active when BOTH inputs receive power.
english: A logic gate. Output active when BOTH inputs receive power.
spanish: Puerta lógica. Salida activa cuando AMBAS entradas reciben energía.
german: Ein Logik-Gatter. Ausgang aktiv wenn BEIDE Eingänge Strom erhalten.
russian: Логический вентиль. Выход активен при питании ОБОИХ входов.

original: A logic gate. Output active when ANY input receives power.
english: A logic gate. Output active when ANY input receives power.
spanish: Puerta lógica. Salida activa cuando CUALQUIER entrada recibe energía.
german: Ein Logik-Gatter. Ausgang aktiv wenn EIN Eingang Strom erhält.
russian: Логический вентиль. Выход активен при питании ЛЮБОГО входа.

original: A logic gate. Output active when EXACTLY ONE input receives power.
english: A logic gate. Output active when EXACTLY ONE input receives power.
spanish: Puerta lógica. Salida activa cuando EXACTAMENTE UNA entrada recibe energía.
german: Ein Logik-Gatter. Ausgang aktiv wenn GENAU EIN Eingang Strom erhält.
russian: Логический вентиль. Выход активен при питании РОВНО ОДНОГО входа.

original: Logic gate: output ON when both inputs powered. 20 u/s capacity.
english: Logic gate: output ON when both inputs powered. 20 u/s capacity.
spanish: Puerta lógica: salida activa con ambas entradas alimentadas. 20 u/s.
german: Logik-Gatter: Ausgang AN wenn beide Eingänge versorgt. 20 u/s.
russian: Логический вентиль: выход ВКЛ при питании обоих входов. 20 ед/с.

original: Logic gate: output ON when any input powered. 20 u/s capacity.
english: Logic gate: output ON when any input powered. 20 u/s capacity.
spanish: Puerta lógica: salida activa con cualquier entrada alimentada. 20 u/s.
german: Logik-Gatter: Ausgang AN wenn ein Eingang versorgt. 20 u/s.
russian: Логический вентиль: выход ВКЛ при питании любого входа. 20 ед/с.

original: Logic gate: output ON when exactly one input powered. 20 u/s capacity.
english: Logic gate: output ON when exactly one input powered. 20 u/s capacity.
spanish: Puerta lógica: salida activa con exactamente una entrada alimentada. 20 u/s.
german: Logik-Gatter: Ausgang AN wenn genau ein Eingang versorgt. 20 u/s.
russian: Логический вентиль: выход ВКЛ при питании ровно одного входа. 20 ед/с.

original: A floor-mounted pressure pad. Place to deploy.
english: A floor-mounted pressure pad. Place to deploy.
spanish: Placa de presión para suelo. Coloca para desplegar.
russian: Напольная нажимная плита. Разместите для установки.

original: Passes power when a player stands on it. 20 u/s capacity.
english: Passes power when a player stands on it. 20 u/s capacity.
spanish: Transmite energía cuando un jugador pisa sobre ella. 20 u/s.
german: Leitet Strom wenn ein Spieler darauf steht. 20 E/s.
russian: Передаёт энергию, когда игрок стоит на ней. 20 ед/с.

original: A wall-mounted laser tripwire. Place to deploy.
english: A wall-mounted laser tripwire. Place to deploy.
spanish: Cable trampa láser de pared. Coloca para desplegar.
german: Ein wandmontierter Laser-Stolperdraht. Platzieren zum Aufstellen.
russian: Настенный лазерный датчик. Разместите для установки.

original: Passes power when a player crosses the laser beam. 20 u/s capacity.
english: Passes power when a player crosses the laser beam. 20 u/s capacity.
spanish: Transmite energía cuando un jugador cruza el rayo láser. 20 u/s.
german: Leitet Strom wenn ein Spieler den Laserstrahl kreuzt. 20 E/s.
russian: Передаёт энергию, когда игрок пересекает лазерный луч. 20 ед/с.

original: A 7-segment electronic counter. Place to deploy.
english: A 7-segment electronic counter. Place to deploy.
spanish: Contador electrónico de 7 segmentos. Coloca para desplegar.

original: Counts 0-9. Toggle input increments. Pulses output on 9→0 wrap. 20 u/s, 5 u/s self-consumption.
english: Counts 0-9. Toggle input increments. Pulses output on 9→0 wrap. 20 u/s, 5 u/s self-consumption.
spanish: Cuenta 0-9. Entrada toggle incrementa. Pulso de salida al pasar de 9→0. 20 u/s, 5 u/s autoconsumo.
german: Zählt 0-9. Toggle-Eingang erhöht. Ausgangsimpuls bei 9→0. 20 E/s, 5 E/s Eigenverbrauch.
russian: Считает 0-9. Вход toggle увеличивает. Импульс на выходе при 9→0. 20 ед/с, 5 ед/с потребление.

original: A medium UPS battery with charge indicator. Place to deploy.
english: A medium UPS battery with charge indicator. Place to deploy.
spanish: Una batería UPS mediana con indicador de carga. Colocar para desplegar.
german: Eine mittlere USV-Batterie mit Ladeanzeige. Platzieren zum Aufstellen.
russian: Средняя батарея ИБП с индикатором заряда. Установите для развертывания.

original: 10,000 u capacity. Charges from surplus, discharges when needed. 50 chg / 70 dis.
english: 10,000 u capacity. Charges from surplus, discharges when needed. 50 chg / 70 dis.
spanish: Capacidad 10.000 u. Carga del excedente, descarga cuando se necesita. 50 carga / 70 descarga.
german: 10.000 u Kapazität. Lädt aus Überschuss, entlädt bei Bedarf. 50 Ladung / 70 Entladung.
russian: Ёмкость 10 000 ед. Заряжается от излишков, разряжается по необходимости. 50 заряд / 70 разряд.
